news.t: Intech S&P Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF Surpasses $100 Million; Performance Underscores Structural Edge in SMID-Cap Core
Intech Launches Next-Generation ETFs to Challenge Market Concentration

holdings.infoBox: SMDX is an equity ETF with a total of 558 individual holdings. The top holdings are East West Bancorp stock at 1.26%, Jones Lang LaSalle at 1.21%, US Foods Holding at 1.04%, Lamar Advertising Company at 1.01%, and Tenet Healthcare at 0.99%.

overview.description: The Intech S&P Small-Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF (SMDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of US small- to mid-cap companies found in the S&P 1000 Index. It utilizes volatility, correlation, profitability, and valuations to identify and select stocks. SMDX was launched on Feb 27, 2025 and is issued by Intech ETFs.

data.title: Intech S&P Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF Surpasses $100 Million; Performance Underscores Structural Edge in SMID-Cap Core
data.text: One of Just 11% of Active ETFs to Surpass $100 Million in Year One WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. , Nov. 19, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- The Intech S&P Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF (NYSE Arca: SMDX) has surpassed $1...

data.title: Intech Launches Next-Generation ETFs to Challenge Market Concentration
data.text: Intech launches ETFs to mitigate concentration risk, applying systematic rebalancing to maintain broad market exposure while optimizing diversification.
